2361.iwh_en: It was narrated from Shurayh that he said concerning a foundling (laqit): he does not inherit from anyone.
2361.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Shurayh bahwa ia berkata mengenai anak temuan (laqit): ia tidak mewarisi dari siapa pun.

2362.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibrahim that he said concerning a foundling: he does not inherit, and no one inherits from him except the public treasury (bayt al-mal).
2362.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibrahim bahwa ia berkata mengenai anak temuan: ia tidak mewarisi, dan tidak ada yang mewarisi darinya kecuali baitul mal.

2363.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Amr ibn Shu'ayb, from his father, from his grandfather, that Abu Bakr (may Allah be pleased with him) did not give the foundling any inheritance, and that 'Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) did not give him inheritance either, and that 'Uthman (may Allah be pleased with him) gave him one-sixth, and that 'Ali (may Allah be pleased with him) gave him the full inheritance.
2363.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Amr ibn Shu'ayb, dari ayahnya, dari kakeknya, bahwa Abu Bakr (radhiyallahu 'anhu) tidak memberikan warisan kepada anak temuan, dan 'Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) juga tidak memberikannya warisan, sedangkan 'Uthman (radhiyallahu 'anhu) memberikannya seperenam, dan 'Ali (radhiyallahu 'anhu) memberikannya warisan penuh.

2364.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Ali (may Allah be pleased with him) that he ruled that the child born of fornication (walad al-zina) inherits from his mother and she inherits from him.
2364.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Ali (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia memutuskan bahwa anak hasil zina (walad al-zina) mewarisi dari ibunya dan ibunya mewarisi darinya.

2365.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Ata' that he said: the child of li'an and the child of fornication are the same — he inherits from his mother and she inherits from him.
2365.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Ata' bahwa ia berkata: anak li'an dan anak zina hukumnya sama — ia mewarisi dari ibunya dan ibunya mewarisi darinya.

2366.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibrahim that he said: the child of fornication inherits from his mother and the maternal relatives (ahl al-umm) inherit from him.
2366.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibrahim bahwa ia berkata: anak zina mewarisi dari ibunya dan kerabat dari pihak ibu (ahl al-umm) mewarisi darinya.

2367.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Sha'bi that he said: the child of fornication inherits from his mother and she inherits from him.
2367.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Sha'bi bahwa ia berkata: anak zina mewarisi dari ibunya dan ibunya mewarisi darinya.

2368.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Ata' ibn Abi Rabah that he said: the child of li'an inherits from his mother and the maternal relatives, and they inherit from him.
2368.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Ata' ibn Abi Rabah bahwa ia berkata: anak li'an mewarisi dari ibunya dan kerabat dari pihak ibu, dan mereka mewarisi darinya.

2369.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn 'Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: whoever claims lineage to other than his father, he has no share of inheritance.
2369.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn 'Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: barangsiapa mengaku nasab kepada selain ayahnya, maka ia tidak mendapat bagian warisan.

2370.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Umar ibn al-Khattab (may Allah be pleased with him) that he placed the inheritance of the child of li'an with his mother.
2370.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Umar ibn al-Khattab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia menetapkan warisan anak li'an kepada ibunya.

2371.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibrahim that he said: 'Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) placed the inheritance of the child of li'an with his mother, and she inherits from him as the mother of a free man inherits.
2371.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibrahim bahwa ia berkata: 'Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) menetapkan warisan anak li'an kepada ibunya, dan ia mewarisi darinya sebagaimana ibu seorang orang merdeka mewarisi.

2372.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Ali (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said concerning the child of fornication: his inheritance goes to his mother.
2372.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Ali (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata mengenai anak zina: warisannya diberikan kepada ibunya.

2373.iwh_en: It was narrated from Shurayh that he gave the inheritance of the child of li'an to his mother.
2373.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Shurayh bahwa ia memberikan warisan anak li'an kepada ibunya.

2374.iwh_en: It was narrated from Shurayh that he said: the child of li'an and the child of fornication — their inheritance goes to their mothers.
2374.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Shurayh bahwa ia berkata: anak li'an dan anak zina — warisan mereka diberikan kepada ibu-ibu mereka.

2375.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Sha'bi that he said: the inheritance of the child of li'an goes to his mother if she is living; if she has died, then to her heirs.
2375.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Sha'bi bahwa ia berkata: warisan anak li'an diberikan kepada ibunya jika ia masih hidup; jika ia telah wafat, maka kepada ahli warisnya.

2376.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Ata' that he said: the child of li'an inherits from his maternal uncles ('umuma) and his maternal aunts.
2376.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Ata' bahwa ia berkata: anak li'an mewarisi dari paman-paman dari pihak ibunya ('umuma) dan bibi-bibi dari pihak ibunya.

2377.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibrahim that he said concerning the child of li'an: his inheritance goes to his maternal uncles if they exist; if not, to the public treasury.
2377.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibrahim bahwa ia berkata mengenai anak li'an: warisannya diberikan kepada paman-paman dari pihak ibunya jika mereka ada; jika tidak ada, kepada baitul mal.

2378.iwh_en: It was narrated from Makhul that he said: 'Uthman ibn 'Affan (may Allah be pleased with him) ruled that the inheritance of a sa'iba slave — one who was freed unconditionally with no walaa' ties — goes to the public treasury.
2378.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Makhul bahwa ia berkata: 'Uthman ibn 'Affan (radhiyallahu 'anhu) memutuskan bahwa warisan budak sa'iba — yaitu yang dimerdekakan tanpa syarat tanpa ikatan walaa' — diberikan kepada baitul mal.

2379.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Sha'bi that he said: 'Ali (may Allah be pleased with him) said: the inheritance of the sa'iba goes to his companions (those who freed him).
2379.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Sha'bi bahwa ia berkata: 'Ali (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: warisan sa'iba diberikan kepada teman-temannya (mereka yang memerdekakannya).

2380.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn 'Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said regarding the sa'iba: his inheritance goes to the public treasury.
2380.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn 'Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata mengenai sa'iba: warisannya diberikan kepada baitul mal.

2381.iwh_en: It was narrated from Masruq that he said: 'Abdullah ibn Mas'ud (may Allah be pleased with him) was asked about the sa'iba, and he said: his inheritance goes to the public treasury.
2381.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Masruq bahwa ia berkata: 'Abdullah ibn Mas'ud (radhiyallahu 'anhu) ditanya tentang sa'iba, dan ia berkata: warisannya diberikan kepada baitul mal.

2382.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibrahim that he said: the inheritance of the sa'iba goes to the public treasury — that was the view of 'Umar and 'Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with them both).
2382.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibrahim bahwa ia berkata: warisan sa'iba diberikan kepada baitul mal — itulah pendapat 'Umar dan 'Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhuma).

2383.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Sha'bi that he said: 'Ali (may Allah be pleased with him) ruled differently from 'Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) regarding the sa'iba — 'Ali said: his inheritance goes to those who freed him; 'Umar said: to the public treasury.
2383.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Sha'bi bahwa ia berkata: 'Ali (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berbeda pendapat dengan 'Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) mengenai sa'iba — 'Ali berkata: warisannya kepada mereka yang memerdekakannya; 'Umar berkata: kepada baitul mal.

2384.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn 'Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: the sa'iba's inheritance goes to the public treasury.
2384.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn 'Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: warisan sa'iba diberikan kepada baitul mal.

2385.iwh_en: It was narrated from Mu'adh ibn Jabal (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: the walaa' of the sa'iba is given to the Muslims.
2385.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Mu'adh ibn Jabal (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: walaa' sa'iba diberikan kepada kaum muslimin.

2386.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Sha'bi that he said: 'Umar ibn al-Khattab (may Allah be pleased with him) said: the inheritance of the sa'iba belongs to the public treasury, for he had no master (mawla) in his lifetime.
2386.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Sha'bi bahwa ia berkata: 'Umar ibn al-Khattab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: warisan sa'iba milik baitul mal, karena ia tidak memiliki tuan (mawla) semasa hidupnya.

2387.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurayrah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "If a child lets out a cry (istihlal) at birth, it inherits."
2387.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurayrah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Jika seorang bayi mengeluarkan tangisan (istihlal) saat lahir, maka ia mewarisi."

2388.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Mughirah ibn Shu'bah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "The child who cries out at birth inherits and is prayed over."
2388.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Mughirah ibn Shu'bah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Bayi yang menangis saat lahir mewarisi dan dishalatkan."

2389.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn 'Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "The child who cries out at birth inherits."
2389.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn 'Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Bayi yang menangis saat lahir mewarisi."

2390.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Mas'ud (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: if a child cries out, it inherits and is prayed over.
2390.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Mas'ud (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: jika seorang bayi menangis, maka ia mewarisi dan dishalatkan.

2391.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Umar ibn al-Khattab (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: the child who cries out at birth inherits.
2391.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Umar ibn al-Khattab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: bayi yang menangis saat lahir mewarisi.

2392.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Ali ibn Abi Talib (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: if a child cries out, it inherits.
2392.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Ali ibn Abi Talib (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: jika seorang bayi menangis, maka ia mewarisi.

2393.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Sha'bi that he said: 'Ali and Zayd (may Allah be pleased with them both) used to say: if a child is born alive — even if only for a moment — then falls silent, it inherits and is prayed over.
2393.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Sha'bi bahwa ia berkata: 'Ali dan Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) biasa berkata: jika seorang anak lahir hidup — meskipun hanya sesaat — kemudian diam, maka ia mewarisi dan dishalatkan.

2394.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qilaba that he said: 'Umar ibn al-Khattab (may Allah be pleased with him) was asked about a woman who died in childbirth — she and the child died together. He said: the child inherits from the mother if it cried out, and the mother's heirs inherit from the child.
2394.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qilaba bahwa ia berkata: 'Umar ibn al-Khattab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) ditanya tentang seorang wanita yang meninggal saat melahirkan — ia dan bayinya meninggal bersama-sama. Ia berkata: bayi mewarisi dari ibunya jika ia menangis, dan ahli waris ibu mewarisi dari bayi.

2395.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Ali (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: whoever manumits a share of a slave along with others, the walaa' belongs to all of them jointly.
2395.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Ali (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: barangsiapa memerdekakan bagian dari seorang budak bersama orang lain, maka walaa' menjadi milik mereka semua secara bersama.

2396.iwh_en: It was narrated from Qatada that he said: 'Umar ibn al-Khattab (may Allah be pleased with him) ruled that when several partners jointly free a slave, the walaa' belongs to all of them together.
2396.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Qatada bahwa ia berkata: 'Umar ibn al-Khattab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) memutuskan bahwa ketika beberapa mitra secara bersama-sama memerdekakan seorang budak, walaa' menjadi milik mereka semua bersama-sama.

2397.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn 'Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: the walaa' follows those who freed the slave.
2397.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn 'Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: walaa' mengikuti mereka yang memerdekakan budak.

2398.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Ali (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said regarding a slave owned by partners — when they freed him: the walaa' belongs to all of them proportionally to their shares.
2398.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Ali (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata mengenai budak yang dimiliki bersama-sama — ketika mereka memerdekakannya: walaa' menjadi milik mereka semua secara proporsional sesuai saham mereka.

2399.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Sha'bi that he said: if several men jointly free a slave, the walaa' is divided among them.
2399.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Sha'bi bahwa ia berkata: jika beberapa orang bersama-sama memerdekakan seorang budak, walaa' dibagi di antara mereka.

2400.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Ata' that he said: if three men each own a third of a slave and one of them frees his third, the walaa' for that third belongs to the one who freed it.
2400.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Ata' bahwa ia berkata: jika tiga orang masing-masing memiliki sepertiga dari seorang budak dan salah satu dari mereka memerdekakan sepertiga miliknya, maka walaa' untuk bagian itu menjadi milik yang memerdekakannya.

2401.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibrahim that he said: the walaa' of a jointly-freed slave belongs to those who freed him, each in proportion to his share.
2401.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibrahim bahwa ia berkata: walaa' budak yang dimerdekakan bersama menjadi milik mereka yang memerdekakannya, masing-masing sesuai bagiannya.

2402.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Sha'bi that he said: Shurayh ruled that if a man frees half of a slave, the walaa' for the entire slave belongs entirely to him.
2402.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Sha'bi bahwa ia berkata: Shurayh memutuskan bahwa jika seorang laki-laki memerdekakan setengah dari seorang budak, maka walaa' untuk seluruh budak menjadi miliknya sepenuhnya.

2403.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: walaa' belongs only to men — women do not have walaa' except for what they themselves freed.
2403.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: walaa' hanya untuk laki-laki — perempuan tidak mendapat walaa' kecuali untuk apa yang mereka sendiri merdekakan.

2404.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Ali (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: women do not have walaa' except over what they freed themselves.
2404.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Ali (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: perempuan tidak memiliki walaa' kecuali atas apa yang mereka sendiri merdekakan.

2405.iwh_en: It was narrated from Shurayh that he said: women have no walaa' inheritance except over what they themselves freed or what those they freed then freed.
2405.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Shurayh bahwa ia berkata: perempuan tidak mendapat warisan walaa' kecuali atas apa yang mereka sendiri merdekakan atau apa yang dimerdekakan oleh mereka yang telah mereka merdekakan.

2406.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibrahim that he said: a woman's walaa' is restricted to what she herself freed — she does not share in her husband's walaa' nor in her son's walaa'.
2406.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibrahim bahwa ia berkata: walaa' seorang perempuan terbatas pada apa yang ia sendiri merdekakan — ia tidak berbagi dalam walaa' suaminya maupun dalam walaa' anaknya.

2407.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Ata' that he said: a woman's walaa' goes only to her own male relatives ('ashabah) — not to her husband.
2407.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Ata' bahwa ia berkata: walaa' seorang perempuan hanya kepada kerabat laki-laki ('ashabah) miliknya sendiri — bukan kepada suaminya.

2408.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Sha'bi that he said: a woman's walaa' returns to her 'ashabah, not to her husband.
2408.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Sha'bi bahwa ia berkata: walaa' seorang perempuan kembali kepada 'ashabah-nya, bukan kepada suaminya.

2409.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibrahim that he said: a woman who frees a slave — her walaa' goes to her 'ashabah upon her death.
2409.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibrahim bahwa ia berkata: seorang perempuan yang memerdekakan budak — walaa'nya diberikan kepada 'ashabah-nya setelah ia meninggal.

2410.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Sha'bi that he said: 'Umar and 'Ali (may Allah be pleased with them both) ruled that the walaa' of a woman who frees a slave belongs to her 'ashabah — the males from her own family lineage.
2410.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Sha'bi bahwa ia berkata: 'Umar dan 'Ali (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) memutuskan bahwa walaa' seorang perempuan yang memerdekakan budak menjadi milik 'ashabah-nya — laki-laki dari garis keturunan keluarganya sendiri.
